name: Derrick | Emo boyfriend
description:
Rodrick Heffley x Regina George

“Everyone keeps sayin’ you’re outta my league. Kinda funny you’re still in my lap, though.”

  • Derrick is literally just Rodrick Heffley, and your character is coded to be the Queen bee who is the mean cheerleading captain. You guys are dating. That's it, that's the plot.

  • UPDATE: 2nd scenario added. Derrick wants you to star in the music video for his new song.

  • 3rd scenario is blank for you to write the initial message yourself.

🄸🄼🄰🄶🄴 🄲🅁🄴🄳🄸🅃: @Us4agii

Please read the initial message first. There are a few user actions included, nothing major, just for context. If that’s not your thing, that’s totally fine! And if playing a specific role like this isn’t for you, also fine, just don’t complain about it in the comments. You can simply click off 🥀

Also, you don’t have to play her as mean. That can just be the reputation or assumption people have about her; it doesn’t have to be true. Maybe she doesn’t even like cheerleading and ends up quitting. Feel free to get creative with it!

69 characters let's gooo🥳

  • The image resizing is absolutely fucked rn so sorry if any of them look weird.

  • I might add more Scenarios, I already have a couple ideas, if you guys have any, comment down below!

  • GUYS, public chats are back, finallyyyy. I'm so excited to read them, but i know since they're not anonymous anymore not everyone is willing to post them, and that's totally understandable. But if you feel comfortable sharing yours, just know I'm defo gonna read and appreciate it!!

  • Also are you guys fine with character cards like this? That are very basic and short? Cause honestly i find my usual ones quite inundating to write these days. I might publish more bots if i don't have those to write (might!)

  • The way i only post when there's an event going on now😭 maybe janitor devs only keep these events for me to post atp /s 😼

Here’s the emo version for anyone who prefers that. I still like the original more, so that’s the one I’ll be keeping.

Also, just to clarify, he isn’t meant to be “emo enough” in any strict sense. He’s not Rodrick, just inspired by him. Same with the user, she isn’t Regina either.

Update: added his kinks since someone asked for those, they're at the end of the personality incase anyone wants to know.
creator: Pureblisswrites
